name: Itius Hayn
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. During the day, wears an almost complete set of Imperial Watch armor, missing only the shield and helmet. Armed with a silver claymore. At night, wears a blue and green outfit with russet felt shoes. Carries burgundy linens.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: righteous, dutiful, incorruptible, determined, honorable
Role: A Guard Captain of the Imperial Watch in the Imperial City, responsible for patrolling the Elven Gardens District in the morning and the Talos Plaza District in the afternoon. Unlike other Watch leaders who shy away from confronting corruption within their own ranks, Itius demonstrates exceptional integrity by arresting fellow Captain Audens Avidius during the Imperial Corruption investigation. He personally escorts the corrupt captain to the Imperial Prison and ensures he is locked up, saving Market District merchants from Avidius's criminal extortion.
Home Location Information: Lives in the Captain's Quarters on the top floor of the Northwest Watch Tower, located between the Elven Gardens and Talos Plaza Districts.
author: Bethesda
